Bash(source ~/.bash_profile && conda activate yolo-game-310 && python -c "
import stable_retro as retro
print\('stable-retro 数据目录:'\)
print\(retro.__file__\)

# 查看 retro 的数据路径
import os
retro_path = os.path.dirname\(retro.__file__\)
print\(f'\\nretro 包路径: {retro_path}'\)

# 查看数据目录
data_path = os.path.join\(retro_path, 'data', 'stable'\)
print\(f'\\n游戏数据目录: {data_path}'\)
print\(f'\\n已支持的游戏:'\)
if os.path.exists\(data_path\):
    games = os.listdir\(data_path\)[:10]
    for g in games:
        print\(f'  - {g}'\)
    print\(f'  ... 共 {len\(os.listdir\(data_path\)\)} 个游戏'\)
")

Bash(source ~/.bash_profile && conda activate yolo-game-310 && python -c "
import stable_retro as retro
import os

# 检查是否有 Contra
data_path = '/Volumes/AppleExt/Codes/yolo-game-sb3/stable-retro/tmp/stable-retro/stable_retro/data/stable'
games = os.listdir\(data_path\)
contra_games = [g for g in games if 'contra' in g.lower\(\)]
print\('Contra 相关游戏:'\)
for g in contra_games:
    print\(f'  - {g}'\)

# 查看 Contra-Nes 的目录结构
contra_path = os.path.join\(data_path, 'Contra-Nes'\)
if os.path.exists\(contra_path\):
    print\(f'\\nContra-Nes 目录结构:'\)
    for f in os.listdir\(contra_path\):
        fpath = os.path.join\(contra_path, f\)
        if os.path.isfile\(fpath\):
            size = os.path.getsize\(fpath\)
            print\(f'  {f} \({size} bytes\)'\)
        else:
            print\(f'  {f}/ \(目录\)'\)
")

import stable_retro as retro
# 查看可用的游戏列表
print\('查看 Contra 相关的游戏:'\)
games = retro.list_games\(\)
contra_games = [g for g in games if 'contra' in g.lower\(\) or 'Contra' in g]
for g in contra_games:
    print\(f'  - {g}'\)

print\(f'\\n总共 {len\(games\)} 个可用游戏'\)
")

Bash(source ~/.bash_profile && conda activate yolo-game-310 && python -c "
import stable_retro as retro
import os

# 查找所有 NES 游戏
data_path = '/Volumes/AppleExt/Codes/yolo-game-sb3/stable-retro/tmp/stable-retro/stable_retro/data/stable'
games = [g for g in os.listdir\(data_path\) if g.endswith\('-Nes'\) or g.endswith\('-Nes-v0'\)]
print\(f'共 {len\(games\)} 个 NES 游戏'\)
print\('\\n包含 contra/魂斗罗 的游戏:'\)
contra_games = [g for g in games if 'contra' in g.lower\(\) or 'Contra' in g]
for g in contra_games:
    print\(f'  - {g}'\)

# 尝试创建环境看是否需要 ROM
print\('\\n尝试创建 ContraForce 环境:'\)
try:
    env = retro.make\(game='ContraForce-Nes-v0', state='Level1'\)
    print\(f'成功! 观察空间: {env.observation_space}'\)
    env.close\(\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'错误: {e}'\)
")

Bash(source ~/.bash_profile && conda activate yolo-game-310 && python -c "
import stable_retro as retro

# 查看导入的游戏
print\('已导入的游戏:'\)
import os
data_path = os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(retro.__file__\), 'data', 'stable'\)
contra_games = [g for g in os.listdir\(data_path\) if 'contra' in g.lower\(\)]
for g in contra_games:
    print\(f'  - {g}'\)

# 测试创建环境
print\('\\n测试创建 Contra-Nes 环境:'\)
env = retro.make\(game='Contra-Nes', state='Level1'\)
print\(f'成功!'\)
print\(f'观察空间: {env.observation_space}'\)
print\(f'动作空间: {env.action_space}'\)
env.close\(\)
")

Bash(source ~/.bash_profile && conda activate yolo-game-310 && python -c "
import stable_retro as retro
import os

# 查看数据目录
data_path = os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(retro.__file__\), 'data'\)
print\('stable-retro 数据目录:'\)
print\(f'  路径: {data_path}'\)

# 查看 stable 目录
stable_path = os.path.join\(data_path, 'stable'\)
print\(f'\\nstable 目录内容:'\)
for item in os.listdir\(stable_path\)[:10]:
    print\(f'  - {item}'\)

# 查看 Contra-Nes 目录
contra_path = os.path.join\(stable_path, 'Contra-Nes'\)
if os.path.exists\(contra_path\):
    print\(f'\\nContra-Nes 目录:'\)
    for f in os.listdir\(contra_path\):
        fpath = os.path.join\(contra_path, f\)
        size = os.path.getsize\(fpath\) if os.path.isfile\(fpath\) else 'DIR'
        print\(f'  {f} \({size}\)'\)
")

Bash(source ~/.bash_profile && conda activate yolo-game-310 && python -c "
import stable_retro as retro

# 列出所有游戏
games = retro.data.list_games\(inttype=retro.data.Integrations.ALL\)
print\('所有可用游戏 \(包括 experimental\):'\)
contra_games = [g for g in games if 'contra' in g.lower\(\)]
for g in contra_games:
    print\(f'  - {g}'\)

# 尝试使用 ALL integrations 创建环境
print\('\\n尝试创建 Contra-Nes 环境 \(使用 ALL integrations\):'\)
try:
    import retro
    env = retro.RetroEnv\(game='Contra-Nes', state='Level1', inttype=retro.data.Integrations.ALL\)
    print\(f'成功!'\)
    print\(f'观察空间: {env.observation_space}'\)
    print\(f'动作空间: {env.action_space}'\)
    env.close\(\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'错误: {e}'\)
")
